name: civil_infrastructure_emergency_exemption_mesa_ind_col
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Civil Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around civil infrastructure emergency exemption mesa ind col has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elliot Hughes
agents.identity: I am Elliot Hughes, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Civil Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Navarro
agents.identity: I am Nadia Navarro, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Civil Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if individual advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for collective.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Elliot Hughes must choose under individual versus collective. What does Elliot Hughes do?
